title: Aera: Cross Platform Agentic Browser
abstract: Aera, a cross-platform agentic browser, acts as your personal assistant to handle all your online tasks seamlessly. Whether you're researching, shopping, or dealing with urgent emails, Aera switches effortlessly, turning you into a multitasking pro in no time. Try it out and experience smarter browsing!
abstract_zh: Aera，一个跨平台的智能代理浏览器，就像你的私人助手一样，在你上网的同时帮你搞定一切！无论是查资料、购物比价还是处理紧急邮件，它都能无缝切换，让你分分钟变身为多任务高手。快来试试吧，用Aera开启智能化浏览新体验！
